item.title: 300MPH Airplane Barn Find
item.description: A look at a high-performance aircraft discovered after years in storage. The video explores its condition, history, and the work needed to determine whether it can return to flight. What would you inspect first on a long-stored aircraft?

media:content.media:title: 300MPH Airplane Barn Find
media:content.media:description: A look at a high-performance aircraft discovered after years in storage. The video explores its condition, history, and the work needed to determine whether it can return to flight. What would you inspect first on a long-stored aircraft?

item.title: From Dust to Skies: Abandoned Airplane Revival
item.description: A look at the restoration of a 37-year-abandoned airplane, with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling around the aircraft’s return to form. What stood out most to you?

media:content.media:title: From Dust to Skies: Abandoned Airplane Revival
media:content.media:description: A look at the restoration of a 37-year-abandoned airplane, with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling around the aircraft’s return to form. What stood out most to you?

item.title: Surprising a Friend With a Free Airplane
item.description: A friend receives the surprise of a lifetime when they're gifted an airplane, leading to an unforgettable reaction and a memorable aviation moment.

media:content.media:title: Surprising a Friend With a Free Airplane
media:content.media:description: A friend receives the surprise of a lifetime when they're gifted an airplane, leading to an unforgettable reaction and a memorable aviation moment.

item.title: Must You Buy a Plane Before Your First Lesson?
item.description: Do you need to own an airplane before learning to fly? This video explores what new pilots should know about flight training, aircraft access, and the costs of getting started.

media:content.media:title: Must You Buy a Plane Before Your First Lesson?
media:content.media:description: Do you need to own an airplane before learning to fly? This video explores what new pilots should know about flight training, aircraft access, and the costs of getting started.

item.title: The Best Gifts Don’t Come in Boxes
item.description: A simple aviation-themed message about how the best gifts can come with wings instead of wrapping. It blends planes, storytelling, and a light lifestyle tone. What kind of gift would you choose?

media:content.media:title: The Best Gifts Don’t Come in Boxes
media:content.media:description: A simple aviation-themed message about how the best gifts can come with wings instead of wrapping. It blends planes, storytelling, and a light lifestyle tone. What kind of gift would you choose?

item.title: Biggest Barn Find of My Life
item.description: A look at a major barn find and the story around it, with real-life commentary and reactions. The video focuses on the discovery and what makes it stand out. What do you think was found?

media:content.media:title: Biggest Barn Find of My Life
media:content.media:description: A look at a major barn find and the story around it, with real-life commentary and reactions. The video focuses on the discovery and what makes it stand out. What do you think was found?

item.title: Offer Made: 4 Abandoned Planes Revival Quest
item.description: A look at an offer made for four abandoned planes and the effort to bring them back into use. The video follows the revival quest with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Offer Made: 4 Abandoned Planes Revival Quest
media:content.media:description: A look at an offer made for four abandoned planes and the effort to bring them back into use. The video follows the revival quest with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling. What happens next?

item.title: Inside a Real Abandoned MiG 15 Jet
item.description: A look inside a real abandoned MiG 15 jet, with aviation commentary and storytelling around the aircraft’s condition and details. What stands out most about this jet?

media:content.media:title: Inside a Real Abandoned MiG 15 Jet
media:content.media:description: A look inside a real abandoned MiG 15 jet, with aviation commentary and storytelling around the aircraft’s condition and details. What stands out most about this jet?

item.title: Flying $1M in Gold Across the US
item.description: A look at a mission to fly $1M in gold across the US, with aviation-focused commentary and reactions along the way. The video follows the journey and asks whether the mission is a success.

media:content.media:title: Flying $1M in Gold Across the US
media:content.media:description: A look at a mission to fly $1M in gold across the US, with aviation-focused commentary and reactions along the way. The video follows the journey and asks whether the mission is a success.

item.title: We Have Bad News and Bad News
item.description: An aviation update revealing unexpected problems during an aircraft project. The video covers the issues discovered and the decisions needed to move forward. How would you approach a project setback like this?

media:content.media:title: We Have Bad News and Bad News
media:content.media:description: An aviation update revealing unexpected problems during an aircraft project. The video covers the issues discovered and the decisions needed to move forward. How would you approach a project setback like this?

item.title: Will This Abandoned Plane Take Off?
item.description: A look at an abandoned aircraft project and the challenges involved in determining whether it can return to the skies. The video follows inspections, repairs, and restoration possibilities. What’s the biggest challenge with reviving old aircraft?

media:content.media:title: Will This Abandoned Plane Take Off?
media:content.media:description: A look at an abandoned aircraft project and the challenges involved in determining whether it can return to the skies. The video follows inspections, repairs, and restoration possibilities. What’s the biggest challenge with reviving old aircraft?

item.title: Piper Aztec Saga: Beyond the Blue Tarp
item.description: A continuation of an aircraft project involving a Piper PA-23 Aztec, covering repairs, decisions, and progress beyond its previous storage. What part of aircraft restoration interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Piper Aztec Saga: Beyond the Blue Tarp
media:content.media:description: A continuation of an aircraft project involving a Piper PA-23 Aztec, covering repairs, decisions, and progress beyond its previous storage. What part of aircraft restoration interests you most?
